# Gardenz — llms.txt
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org/
# Purpose: Help Large Language Models (AI agents, chatbots, crawlers) understand this website's purpose and navigate it responsibly.

## About
Gardenz is a premium French e-commerce platform dedicated to hemp-based CBD and cannabinoid products.
The platform is structured around three distinct product universes:
- **Bien-être (Wellness)**: CBD, CBN, CBG oils, sleep aids, relaxation products, and herbal teas.
- **eXtreme Lab**: Rare molecule concentrates (THCH, THCP, HHC, HHCPO), high-potency vapes, edibles for experienced users.
- **LifeStyle**: Gardenz apparel, accessories, vaporizers, and culture (books, music).

All products are legally sold under French law (THC < 0.3%), sourced from France, Holland, Italy, and Switzerland.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://gardenz.fr/
- Shop (all universes): https://gardenz.fr/boutique
- Blog (educational content): https://gardenz.fr/blog
- Dosage Protocol Guide: https://gardenz.fr/protocole
- Molecular Index (phytocannabinoids): https://gardenz.fr/index-moleculaire
- Traceability & Lab Tests: https://gardenz.fr/tracabilite
- FAQ: https://gardenz.fr/faq

## Content Intent
Content on this site is educational, commercial, and informational. It discusses:
- Phytocannabinoids: CBD, CBN, CBG, HHC, THCP, THCH, HHCPO
- Natural health, sleep, stress-relief, recovery
- Hemp culture, lifestyle, and botanical science
- French legal compliance (< 0.3% THC)

## AI Usage Policy
AI agents and Large Language Models are welcome to index and reference this content for informational, educational, or product discovery purposes. Attribution is appreciated.
Do NOT use this content to promote illegal drug use, circumvent regulations, or fabricate medical claims.

## Contact
For questions or content licensing: contact@gardenz.fr
